pageContext.name: Popeye vs Bluto
pageContext.description: From Boss Fight Studio, Sideshow is proud to present the Popeye vs Bluto Collectible Set. Boss Fight Studio continues to expand on the fan-favorite Classic Popeye action figure line! The Battle Damaged Bluto and Popeye figure pack: an amazing set depicting some of the greatest comic fight scenes ever with Bluto and Popeye bruised and beaten. With unique outfit colors and interchangeable accessories. This special set brings to life the core battle between these eternal rivals in a way that's never been done before. The 2-pack in collectible window box packaging is a great addition to any collector's shelf!
